description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat, multi-leveled roof design, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows on the main facade and a combination of white and muted earth-tone exterior walls. The structure includes a prominent garage with a dark driveway, a spacious terrace area, and a rooftop patio with outdoor furniture and greenery. The building is surrounded by a low fence and includes a small gazebo or shaded seating area in the yard. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped in large panels and others more isolated. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, a garage, rooftop patio, and outdoor seating area, featuring clean lines and open spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, garage, and driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop patio, terrace, and partial fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the outdoor seating area, gazebo, and more of the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the garage, driveway, and side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front facade
